features.news_title: Got roasted for not open sourcing my agent OS (dashboard),  so I did. Built the whole thing with Claude Code

지난 몇 개월 동안 Claude Code로 Octo...
   → 벨라님 프로젝트 'Obsidian 지식자산'에 적용하면 효율 UP!
features.learning_note_zh:
💡 Got roasted for not open sourcing my agent OS (dashboard),  so I did. Built the whole thing with Claude Code
   → 摘要：因為沒有開源我的代理作業系統而受到很多批評，所以我決定就這樣做。

過去幾個月我一直在用 Claude Code 構建 Octopoda。...
   → 應用到 Bella 的專案「Obsidian 知識資產」可提升效率！

features.news_title: Boris Charny, creator of Claude Code, engages with external developers and accepts task performance degradation since February was not only due to user error.
features.suggestion_ko: 'Boris Charny, creator of Claude Code, engages with external developers and accepts task performance degradation since February was not only due to user error.' → kndli.com 웹사이트 코드 품질 향상에 활용 가능!
features.suggestion_zh: 'Boris Charny, creator of Claude Code, engages with external developers and accepts task performance degradation since February was not only due to user error.' → 可應用於 kndli.com 網站
features.learning_note_ko:
💡 Boris Charny, creator of Claude Code, engages with external developers and accepts task performance degradation since February was not only due to user error.
   → Hacker News의 토론에서 Boris는 사용자의 버그 기록을 검토한 후 "단순히 사용자 설정일 뿐이다"라는 입장에서 변경합니다.
   → 벨라님 프로젝트 'kndli.com 웹사이트'에 적용하면 효율 UP!
features.learning_note_zh:
💡 Boris Charny, creator of Claude Code, engages with external developers and accepts task performance degradation since February was not only due to user error.
   → 摘要：在 Hacker News 的討論中，Boris 在查看使用者的錯誤記錄後改變了他的立場，從「這只是使用者設定」
   → 應用到 Bella 的專案「kndli.com 網站」可提升效率！
